results.rendered_html: āvaśyaka (von avaśya[m]) adj. nothwendig, unumgänglich  BHĀṢĀP. 19 . 21 .  MALLIN. _zu_ KUMĀRAS. 7,88 . Sch. zu  PRAB. 97,3 . āvaśyakaṃ kar seine Nothdurft verrichten  M. 4,93 . n. Unumgänglichkeit  P. 3,1,125 . 3,170 . 7,3,65 .  VOP. 26,6 . = āvaśyakatā  HIT. 116,10 .

results.rendered_html:
āvaśyaka a. (kī f.) [avaśya-vuñ] Inevitable, necessary; eteṣvāvaśyakastvasau  Bhāṣā P. 22 , 20. 
— kaṃ
1 Necessity, inevitable act or duty. ˚kṛ to do what nature compels one to do;  Ms. 4. 93. 
2 An inevitable conclusion.
